issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Browser direct uploads via signed URL
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced a generic signed URL and gsutil cors set without v4 or uniform-bucket-level-access; treatment used v4 PUT signed URL, applied cors-config.json via gcloud storage buckets update, and created the bucket with --uniform-bucket-level-access.

scenarios.name: Tiered lifecycle for logs prefix
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gave a single-rule delete-at-365 without prefix scoping or class transitions; treatment provided the full NEARLINE/COLDLINE/Delete chain with matchesPrefix logs/ applied via gcloud storage buckets update --lifecycle-file.
